ocr_findings.description: Multi-line cells in PPMの横軸と縦軸 table (縦軸/市場成長率 and 横軸/市場占有率/(相対市場シェア)) split across lines within cells in OCR — content fully present, minor formatting difference

PPM quadrant diagram (花形/問題児/金のなる木/負け犬 with illustrative characters) rendered as img-0.jpeg placeholder; the diagram labels visible in image (花形(スター), 問題児, 金のなる木, 負け犬, 市場成長率 axis, 市場占有率(シェア) axis) are not in OCR body text — medium impact as these labels are key terminology, but they ARE present in the surrounding prose

OCR has a line 'PPM' as standalone heading after the table, which appears to label the diagram; not explicitly present as a heading in the original image in the same position — minor structural difference

reviewer_notes: PPM (プロダクト・ポートフォリオ・マネジメント) content page. Table with 縦軸/横軸 descriptions and prose explaining 花形 and 問題児 categories faithfully reproduced. Page cuts off mid-sentence at bottom ('問題児とは、市場成長率が高く、かつ市場占有率（シェア）が低い製品です。ここ') — correctly reflects the page boundary. PPM quadrant diagram labels are embedded in the image and not individually OCR'd, but key terms appear in surrounding text.
